description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Everyone Together for Fitness — Moving Body Project

Learn about preventing frailty. Four lectures on exercise, nutrition, oral health, and dementia prevention will be held.

【Higashi-Aono District Administrative Center】(10:00–11:00)
• June 11, 2026 (Reiwa 8), Thursday: Dementia Prevention Lecture
• September 10, 2026, Thursday: Oral Health Lecture
• October 8, 2026, Wednesday: Nutrition Lecture
• February 25, 2027 (Reiwa 9), Thursday: Exercise Lecture
Registration: Community Comprehensive Support Center Hachiman-cho 042-975-3011

【Kaji District Administrative Center】(14:00–15:00)
• December 9, 2026, Wednesday: Dementia Prevention Lecture
• December 23, 2026, Wednesday: Exercise Lecture
• January 13, 2027, Wednesday: Oral Health Lecture
• January 27, 2027, Wednesday: Nutrition Lecture
Registration: Community Comprehensive Support Center Minami-cho 042-978-5777

【Harashiba Welfare Center】(14:00–15:00)
• May 13, 2026, Wednesday: Dementia Prevention Lecture
• May 27, 2026, Wednesday: Oral Health Lecture
• June 10, 2026, Wednesday: Nutrition Lecture
• June 24, 2026, Wednesday: Exercise Lecture
Registration: Community Comprehensive Support Center Inari-cho 042-980-5043

【Futayanagi District Administrative Center】(10:00–11:00)
• October 9, 2026, Friday: Dementia Prevention Lecture
• November 6, 2026, Friday: Nutrition Lecture
• December 11, 2026, Friday: Oral Health Lecture
• February 12, 2027, Friday: Exercise Lecture
Registration: Community Comprehensive Support Center Sakae-cho 042-971-3172

【Registration Opens】One month before each lecture
【What to Bring】Writing materials, drinking water, eyeglasses (if needed), face towel and comfortable exercise clothes and shoes (for exercise lecture)

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/kaigofukushika/ninchi-sisaku/ninchi-jigyou/7983.html
